creator: markir@paradise.net.nz
text:
7.0-CURRENT + Xorg 7.2 update from 2 says ago, starting X (which seems to work ok) produces messages:

error: [drm:pid802:mach64_dma_init] *ERROR* mach64_dma_init called without lock held
error: [drm:pid802:drm_unlock] *ERROR* Process 802 using kernel context 0

Graphics HW is:

drm0: <Rage XL AGP 2X> on vgapci0
info: [drm] Initialized mach64 1.0.0 20020904

How-To-Repeat: Update to Xorg 7.2 and enable dri/drm on system with Rage XL, then start X via 'startx' without an xorg.conf file.
